notes.content: Excels as an artist, singer, and para-sportsperson despite being born without both hands

facts.fact: Pranav M. Balasubramaniam is from Palakkad in Kerala.
Ila Sachani was born with her hands hanging loose by her sides.
Kathiawar embroidery requires a lot of skill and is traditionally done using feet.
Pranav M. Balasubramaniam excels as an artist, singer, and para-sportsperson despite being born without both hands.
Ila Sachani's mother and grandmother taught her Kathiawar embroidery using her feet.
The government office in Surat displayed Ila Sachani's work at a state exhibition, leading to her fame.
Pranav M. Balasubramaniam's determination and hard work led to his success as an artist, singer, and para-sportsperson.
Ila Sachani's younger brother and sister helped her learn to do things with her legs.
Kathiawar embroidery is a traditional art form of Gujarat that requires a lot of skill and patience.
Pranav M. Balasubramaniam's story inspires people to persevere and overcome any challenge.
